sections.paragraph:
verb לחיות (>>לִחְיוֹת)

to live; exist; survive; recover

verb להחיות

to resuscitate; revive, restore; keep alive

verb הוחיה

be resuscitated; revived; restored

verb לחיות

to live; exist; survive; recover

masculine noun חיים

life, living, existence

adjective

alive, living, vivid, kicking, quick, animate, animated, denizen; live, spot
